author: astaxxoo
content:
Hello everyone, I am Abhivansh. Happy to be part of EPF7!

After exploring the mentor proposals and doing some background research this week, I will be working on the project - Nimbus EL/CL: Rest-SSZ engine API implementation on EL and CL. The project involves adding support for SSZ over REST along with existing JSON-RPC transport between EL and CL. Currently I am gathering more context around it and diving deeper.

Im currently exploring the following the 2 projects:

- Ream: Execution Layer Integration for the Lean Chain
